message:
Security hardening: fix cross-repo leak, remove stubs, validate inputs

- PackWorkerDO: validate all R2 keys are prefixed with repoPath (prevents
  cross-repo data exfiltration via crafted descriptors), cap batch size
- Fan-out: fail on any rejected batch instead of silently dropping objects
  from packfile (prevents incomplete/corrupt clone responses)
- worker.ts: add VALID_PATH_SEGMENT + RESERVED_NAMES validation matching
  handler.ts (prevents path traversal in owner/repo URL segments)
- Remove unused permissions table (was a stub creating false security)
- Remove visibility from updatable fields (stored but never enforced)
- Sanitize DO API error messages (no longer leaks internal details)
- Validate ref names on push via receive-pack (was unvalidated)
- Remove globalThis.__gitmode_env__ (leaked raw R2/DO bindings to isolate)

files.patch:
@@ -67,12 +67,6 @@ CREATE TABLE commits (
   timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL
 );
 
--- Access control
-CREATE TABLE permissions (
-  username TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
-  role TEXT NOT NULL           -- e.g. "admin", "write", "read"
-);
-
 -- Object chunk index (maps SHA → R2 chunk for batch reads)
 CREATE TABLE object_chunks (
   sha TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
